text:
If sunny and dry is your idea of a perfect Friday, you're living it right now, a comfortable 77 out there with low humidity and hardly any wind to speak of. That holds right through the afternoon under high pressure, sunshine topping out near 83, and the models are tight on that number so I'll say it plainly, no hedging needed. Air quality's good, so no worries there.

Tonight stays clear and comfortable, dropping to around 61 with a light southeast breeze. If you're headed to the waterfront this evening, conditions are calm, south winds under 10 knots and waves just 1 to 2 feet, water's a pleasant 70. The lake breeze won't put up much of a fight today, so it should stay pleasant right through sunset around 8:30.

Looking ahead, Saturday holds the same sunny, dry pattern with highs climbing into the mid to upper 80s, just a touch warmer and breezier on the lake. Enjoy this stretch, it's about as clean a summer setup as Burlington gets, with more unsettled weather waiting in the wings for next week.
